segments.text: For the director of music. To the tune of 'Do Not Destroy.'
We give thanks to you, O God; we give thanks, for your name is near.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: People tell of your wonderful deeds.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: When I choose the appointed time, I will judge with equity.
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: receive…: or, take a set time

segments.text: When the earth and all its inhabitants shake,
I say to the boastful, 'Do not boast,' and to the wicked, 'Do not lift up your horn;'
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: do not lift up your horn on high or speak with outstretched neck.'
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For exaltation comes neither from the east nor from the west nor from the desert.
But God is the judge: He brings one down and exalts another.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: For a cup is in the hand of the Lord with foaming wine, fully mixed, and He pours out from it.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Surely all the wicked of the earth shall drain it down to the dregs.
But I will declare it forever; I will sing praise to the God of Jacob.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: All the horns of the wicked I will cut off, but the horns of the righteous shall be lifted up.
segments.speaker: Psalmist
